channel.name: OpenEyes PAS Out

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Set hosnum parameter
Set Message Type and data
Remove Outcome if Interim Outcome is set
Update interval based on outcome
Remove empty Interim Outcome

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['QPD']['QPD.3'].toString()" does not equal ''
Accept message if "msg['PV1']['PV1.19']['PV1.19.1'].toString()" does not equal ''
Accept message if "msg['QPD']['QPD.3'].toString()" does not equal ''
Accept message if "msg['PV1']['PV1.19']['PV1.19.1'].toString()" does not equal ''

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: XSLT Transform Response
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:variable name="vLower" select="'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'"/> <xsl:variable name="vUpper" select="'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'"/>
<xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:element name="PatientList"> <AnswerMessage><xsl:value-of select="//MSA.6.2"/></AnswerMessage> <ErrorMessage><xsl:value-of select="//ERR.3.2"/></ErrorMessage> <xsl:for-each select="//PID"> <xsl:element name="Patient"> <NHSNumber><xsl:value-of select="PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='NHS']/PID.3.1"/></NHSNumber> <!--NHSNumberStatus><xsl:value-of select="PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='NHS']/PID.3.2"/></NHSNumberStatus--> <HospitalNumber><xsl:value-of select="PID.2[PID.2.5/text()='PAS']/PID.2.1"/></HospitalNumber> <Title><xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(PID.5/PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(PID.5/PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/></Title> <FirstName><xsl:value-of select="PID.5/PID.5.2"/><xsl:if test="PID.5/PID.5.3/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(' ',PID.5/PID.5.3)"/></xsl:if></FirstName> <Surname><xsl:value-of select="PID.5/PID.5.1"/></Surname> <DateOfBirth><xsl:if test="PID.7/PID.7.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(PID.7/PID.7.1,1,4),'-',substring(PID.7/PID.7.1,5,2),'-',substring(PID.7/PID.7.1,7,2))"/></xsl:if></DateOfBirth> <Gender><xsl:value-of select="PID.8/PID.8.1"/></Gender> <AddressList> <xsl:for-each select="PID.11[PID.11.7/text()='H' or PID.11.7/text()='CORR']"> <Address> <Line1><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.1"/></Line1> <Line2><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.2"/></Line2> <City><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.3"/></City> <County><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.4"/></County> <Postcode><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.5"/></Postcode> <Country>GB</Country> <Type><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="PID.11.7/text()='H'">HOME</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.7"/></xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></Type> </Address> </xsl:for-each> </AddressList> <TelephoneNumber><xsl:if test="number(translate(normalize-space(PID.13/PID.13.1/text()), ' ', ''))=translate(normalize-space(PID.13/PID.13.1/text()), ' ', '')"><xsl:value-of select="PID.13/PID.13.1/text()"/></xsl:if></TelephoneNumber> <Email><xsl:if test="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='NET']/PID.13.4/text()"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='NET']/PID.13.4/text()" /></xsl:if></Email> <xsl:if test="PID.22/PID.22.1/text()"><EthnicGroup><xsl:value-of select="PID.22/PID.22.1"/></EthnicGroup></xsl:if> <xsl:if test="PID.29/PID.29.1/text()"><DateOfDeath><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(PID.29/PID.29.1,1,4),'-',substring(PID.29/PID.29.1,5,2),'-',substring(PID.29/PID.29.1,7,2))"/></DateOfDeath></xsl:if> <xsl:if test="//PD1"> <PracticeCode><xsl:value-of select="//PD1.3.3"/></PracticeCode> <GpCode><xsl:value-of select="//PD1.4.1"/></GpCode> </xsl:if> </xsl:element> </xsl:for-each> </xsl:element> </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['QPD']['QPD.3'].toString()" does not equal ''
Accept message if "msg['PV1']['PV1.19']['PV1.19.1'].toString()" does not equal ''

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
